sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48257" key="qeoplh/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-πλήξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,= <sense id="n48257.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεόπληκτος, θεοπλήγεσσιν ἐοικότας εἰδώλοισιν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1475.tlg001:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maiist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (unless <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-πληγέσσιν</foreign> from <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-πληγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>).</sense> </entryFree>
